bugs_found.description: addBalance() 没有验证 amount > 0，允许负数
bugs_found.test_failure: test should NOT allow negative balance fails
bugs_found.fix_suggestion: Add validation: if (amount <= 0) throw new Error("Amount must be > 0")

test_requirements: test should NOT allow negative balance must pass

reviewer.reasons: Bug is valid, fix is straightforward, test coverage exists

dev.changes_summary: Added validation in addBalance() to reject negative amounts
dev.commit_message:
[TASK-001] Fix addBalance() validation

- Add validation to reject amount <= 0
- Prevents negative balance bug
- Fixes failing test
